message:
🌱 kubevirt: Increase code coverage by 10% (#1049)

* 🌱 Add kubevirt: Increase code coverage by 10% mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: change kubevirt#1063 type from feature to test

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubevirt-1063-increase-code-coverage-by-10",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubevirt: Increase code coverage by 10%",
+    "description": "Increase code coverage by 10%. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "test",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kubevirt deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kubevirt version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nhelm list -n kubevirt 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kubevirt installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubevirt configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubevirt configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nkubectl get configmap -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevirt\n```\nWe are tracking code coverage using goverage (shown here https://coveralls.io/github/kubevirt/kubevirt).\n\nThis issue is about adding tests to increase the code coverage."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Increase code coverage by 10%",
+        "description": "I fear that most are already excluded. The only ones included are the defaulter and deepcopy files. They are tested with some fuzzing and have almost 100% coverage (another question is if it is really necessary since k8s would probably detect immediately if their generators are broken but it was just easy to do).\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nkubectl get events -n kubevirt --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Increase code coverage by 10%\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I fear that most are already excluded. The only ones included are the defaulter and deepcopy files. They are tested with some fuzzing and have almost 100% coverage (another question is if it is really necessary since k8s would probably detect immediately if their generators are broken but it was just easy to do).",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
